title: Give Your Child Spelling Power in Only 15 Minutes A Day
description: Spelling Power is a multi-sensory, multi-level, individualized spelling program designed to help your student master spelling skills in just 15 minutes per day with little or no lesson planning.

title: Start Spelling Power with the Basic Pack
description: The Spelling Power Basic Pack gives you the materials needed to start teaching spelling right away. You'll receive your own Spelling Power manual with Quick Start DVD, two Student Record Books, and a set of Activity Task Cards.

title: The Spelling Power Deluxe Pack allows you to open the box and start teaching
description: Everything is included in the Spelling Power Deluxe Pack: your Spelling Power manual, two Student Record Books in your choice of level, Activity Task Cards, Magnetic Alphabet Tiles, the Word Bank Box, and access to the Teacher's Online Resources with Quick Start Video and more. Just open the box and start teaching.

title: Spelling Power Activity Task Cards Make Spelling Fun-da-mental!
description: Spelling Power Activity Task Cards are 365 fun ways to master spelling words and strengthen language arts skills. The Activity Task Cards box covers interest and ability levels ranging from eight years old to adult level. Each card is color-coded by ability-interest level with activities requiring just five to ten minutes for students to complete on their own. Activity Task Cards deliver FUNdamental learning with little or no teacher involvement.

title: Magnetic Alphabet Tiles provide fun spelling and phonics learning and are made in the USA!
description: Spelling Power's Magnetic Alphabet Tiles are great alternative to boring workbooks. Students learn by moving letters around to discover word patterns. Tiles and Storage Box are proudly made in the USA.

title: Save Time and Record keeping Using Spelling Power Student Record Books!
description: Spelling Power Student Record Books save you lesson-planning time, eliminate record keeping tasks, and document student progress. Student Record Books include enough Daily Test and 10-Step-Study pages for the average student to master a level.

title: Spelling Power Word Bank Box comes with 400 color-coded cards and a set of dividers to neatly organize study words
description: The Spelling Power Word Bank Box is the perfect way to give your student a neat, organized way to make and store his own spelling study word cards.
